title: Ethiopian Banana Porridge
description: A warm, comforting, and filling breakfast porridge made with ripe bananas, inspired by Ethiopian cuisine. This vegan recipe is perfect for a chilly morning.
instructions: Combine oats, spice blend, and sugar in a saucepan.
Gradually add non-dairy milk, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens.
Mash in ripe bananas using a fork or potato masher.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until porridge is heated through.
Serve warm, garnished with additional spice blend if desired.
